basic_details.job_title: SVP NPA Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy
basic_details.short_information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVPNPA) has officially announced the Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. Eligible candidates up to 50 years of age who possess a Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, SAI, or a recognized University/ Institute, or have participated in Olympic, Asian, World, National, or State-level competitions can attend the walkin interview on 10 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and view the walkin interview details are provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, SAI, or recognized University/ Institute OR Participation in Olympic/ Asian/ World/ National/ State level competition. Desirable: B.P.Ed.
qualification.details: Sports Coach: Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, Sports Authority of India (SAI), or from a recognised Indian/Foreign University/ Institute or certificate course in Coaching. Participation in Olympic Games/Asian Games / World / National / State level competition in the relevant discipline Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed) (Desirable)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SVP NPA Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SVP NPA Sports Coach Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download SVP NPA Sports Coach Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVP NPA Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.sardar_vallabhbhai_patel_national_police: Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, SAI, or recognized University/ Institute OR Participation in Olympic/ Asian/ World/ National/ State level competition. Desirable: B.P.Ed.

content_sections.heading: SVP NPA Sports Coach Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVP NPA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVP NPA Sports Coach Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Sports Coach: Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, Sports Authority of India (SAI), or from a recognised Indian/Foreign University/ Institute or certificate course in Coaching. Participation in Olympic Games/Asian Games / World / National / State level competition in the relevant discipline Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed) (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SVP NPA Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SVP NPA Sports Coach Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVP NPA). It is a prestigious institution under the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, responsible for training IPS officers.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for which the recruitment is being conducted is Sports Coach. This position is on a contract basis, offering an opportunity to contribute to the academy's sports activities and training programs.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Sports Coach post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Sports Coach position. Candidates interested in this single, specialized role should ensure they meet all eligibility criteria before attending the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for the SVP NPA Sports Coach recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is "Walk-in". Candidates are required to directly attend the suitability test/interview on the specified date and time with all necessary documents, without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for the Sports Coach position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sports Coach position is scheduled for 10 July 2026. Candidates must report at the venue well in advance of the scheduled time to complete all registration formalities and participate in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Sports Coach post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Sports Coach post is Upto 50 years. Candidates must ensure they meet this age criterion as of the date of the walk-in interview to be considered eligible for the position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Sports Coach position at SVP NPA?
faq.answer: The selected Sports Coach will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month. This remuneration is offered for the contract-based position, reflecting the importance of the role in the academy's sports department.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications required for the Sports Coach post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include a Diploma in Coaching from NSNIS, Patiala, SAI, or a recognized University/Institute, OR participation in Olympic/Asian/World/National/State level competitions. A B.P.Ed. degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Sports Coach position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Sports Coach position involves a Suitability Test/Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications, experience, and performance during this direct interaction at the walk-in event.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview for the Sports Coach be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Site-B, Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy, Sivarampally, Hyderabad, Telangana - 500052. Candidates should ensure they reach the specified venue on the scheduled date and time.
